On-time delivery
What we haul

Five ways to move your freight

One dispatcher, one point of contact, whatever the load calls for.

Refrigerated

Temperature-controlled reefer for produce, food service and pharma — monitored door to door.

Dry van

Full truckload and LTL for general freight, retail and manufacturing shipments.

Flatbed

Steel, lumber, machinery and oversize loads — tarped, strapped and permitted.

Intermodal

Rail-and-road container moves when transit time can flex and budget can't.

Cross-border

Bonded Canada–USA service with PARS/PAPS pre-clearance handled by our dispatch.

Where we run

Dedicated lanes, posted transit times

Every route below runs weekly out of our Bolton yard. Transit times are door-to-door averages, not best cases.

Maritimes corridor — weekly dedicated runs Cross-border USA — bonded, customs pre-cleared
The fleet

Our trucks, our drivers

Asset-based means the truck that quotes your load is the truck that hauls it. These are our rigs — your load in safe hands.

Shippers on the record

Why loads keep coming back

“They've run our Moncton lane every week for three years. I stopped tracking their trucks — they just show up.”
Operations manager, food distributor — Mississauga, ON
“Customs paperwork used to be our headache. Their dispatch handles PARS before the truck leaves the yard.”
Logistics coordinator, auto parts supplier — Vaughan, ON
“Quoted in an hour, picked up the next morning. That's the whole review.”
Owner, building products wholesaler — Barrie, ON
